# POST form-encoded SPARQL query with explicit Accept = XML
endpoint: sparql_query
classification: spec-required
match_mode: structural-xml
description: POST form-encoded with Accept: XML returns SPARQL XML

=== request
POST /sparql
Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded
Accept: application/sparql-results+xml

query=SELECT%20%2A%20WHERE%20%7B%20%3Fs%20%3Fp%20%3Fo%20%7D%20LIMIT%200

=== response
200
Content-Type: application/sparql-results+xml

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<sparql xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2005/sparql-results#">
  <head>
  </head>
  <results>
  </results>
</sparql>
